description: Custom non-demo IIFE bundle built locally from pinned alibaba/page-agent source for the offline lab. Controlled local build output, not a published package bundle.

build_provenance.dependency_install: npm ci --ignore-scripts using the pinned upstream lockfile
build_provenance.entry: packages/page-agent/src/production-iife-entry.ts (temporary local production IIFE entry created inside the pinned upstream checkout)

vendored_files.source: custom non-demo IIFE built locally from pinned alibaba/page-agent source

integrity.notes: Offline vendored copy. Bundle is a controlled local build artifact; runtime performs no remote fetch.
